description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure dressed in fitted athletic wear, including a long-sleeve top and leggings, complemented by a pair of modern sneakers. The figure's clothing appears to be made from a stretchy, performance-oriented fabric, suitable for active movement in urban environments. The shoes are robust with thick soles, designed for comfort and durability during walking or running. The figure stands upright with a relaxed but alert posture, suggesting readiness for movement. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall build is lean and athletic. The head is not visible in the provided views, focusing attention on the lower body and attire.
description: An adult pedestrian in fitted athletic wear and sneakers, standing upright with a lean, athletic build. The attire is modern and suitable for active movement in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the fitted athletic wear, sneakers, and the stance of the legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the sneakers and the contour of the leggings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the leggings and the heel design of the sneakers.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile of the sneakers and the side seam of the leggings.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic wear including a fitted long-sleeve top and leggings
